questions: Were the code changes minimal and targeted to the two identified files?
Does the bundle command now pass runId to the artifact summary endpoint?
Is the --run flag available and documented in usage/help?
Do all quality gates (build, typecheck, tests) pass after the changes?

answers.answer: Yes. Only two files were modified: src/tickets/bundle.ts (3 changes: import, flag parsing, queryParams) and src/tickets/index.ts (2 changes: usage string and help text). No other files, types, or configuration changed.
evidence: bundle.ts line 5: added getFlag to import from flags.js
bundle.ts line 37: changed runId resolution to explicitRunId ?? ticket.currentRun?.id ?? ticket.runs[0]?.id
bundle.ts lines 44-47: added queryParams: { runId } to hxFetch call
index.ts line 27: added [--run <runId>] to usage string
index.ts line 136: added [--run <runId>] to help text

answers.answer: Yes. The hxFetch call for /tickets/${ticketId}/artifacts now includes queryParams: { runId }, unconditionally passing the resolved runId. This is the core fix that enables the server to return populated stepArtifactSummary for non-active statuses.
evidence: bundle.ts lines 44-47: const artifacts = (await hxFetch(config, `/tickets/${ticketId}/artifacts`, { basePath: '/api', queryParams: { runId } })) as ArtifactsResponse

answers.answer: Yes. The --run flag is parsed via getFlag(args, '--run') and takes precedence over auto-resolved runId. The flag is documented in both the main usage string (line 27) and the bundle-specific help text (line 136).
evidence: Help output verified: 'Usage: hlx tickets bundle <ticket-ref> --out <dir> [--run <runId>]'

answers.answer: Yes. npm run build (exit 0), npm run typecheck (exit 0), and npm test (30/30 tests pass, exit 0) all succeed after the changes.
evidence: npm run build: tsc compiled with exit code 0
npm run typecheck: tsc --noEmit with exit code 0
npm test: 30 tests pass, 0 fail, exit code 0

statement: Implementation complete. Two files modified: bundle.ts (getFlag import, --run flag parsing, queryParams addition to artifacts summary call) and index.ts (usage string and help text updates). All quality gates pass. Live bundle test against staging PREVIEW_READY ticket (HLX-4) completes successfully with no warning errors.
